sub_strands.sub_strand: Critical Listening, Debating, and Public Speaking
outcomes: Listen critically to complex texts and debates to identify fallacies, biases, and primary lines of reasoning
Participate effectively in formal debates using persuasive language, objective evidence, and proper elocution parameters

sub_strands.sub_strand: Advanced Reading Comprehension and Literary Analysis
outcomes: Analyze full-length children's novels and complex articles to interpret themes, character motivations, and subtext
Read grade-level texts fluently (130-150 words per minute) with targeted syntactic and emotional inflections

sub_strands.sub_strand: Functional and Creative Writing Modules
outcomes: Compose formal letters, official emails, and imaginative narratives adhering to rigorous structural and grammatical protocols
Employ complex sentence structures, active/passive voices, and advanced punctuation matrices independently

sub_strands.sub_strand: Kusikiliza kwa Makini na Hotuba
outcomes: Kusikiliza na kuchanganua hotuba au mijadala changamano na kuwasilisha maoni mbadala kwa ufasaha
Kutoa wasilisho la mdomo au hotuba fupi kuhusu masuala ibuka katika jamii kwa ujasiri

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uchambuzi wa Fasihi na Vifungu
outcomes: Kusoma na kufafanua maana fiche, itikadi, na mafunzo katika hadithi, mashairi ya arudhi, na tamthilia fupi
Kutumia kamusi na muktadha kubaini maana ya msamiati maalumu na wa kitaaluma

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uandishi wa Kazi za Kiofisi na Insha Bunifu
outcomes: Kuandika barua rasmi, ratiba za vikao, na insha za hoja zifuatazo kanuni sahihi za sarufi
Kutumia ngeli zote, viunganishi changamano, na kauli za vitendo (tendesha, tendana, tendewa) katika uandishi

sub_strands.sub_strand: Whole Numbers up to 1,000,000
outcomes: Read, write, translate, and evaluate place value matrices for whole numbers up to 1,000,000
Find the L.C.M and G.C.D of up to three numbers using prime factorization methods

sub_strands.sub_strand: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages Optimization
outcomes: Perform operations involving addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division of fractions and decimals up to three decimal places
Convert fractions and decimals into percentages and calculate percentage profit or loss in real-world simulations

sub_strands.sub_strand: Squares and Square Roots
outcomes: Find the square of a number up to 100, and find the square root of perfect squares using factorization or inspection methods

sub_strands.sub_strand: Surface Area, Volume, and Capacity Matrices
outcomes: Calculate the surface area of cubes, cuboids, and triangular prisms using formal algebraic nets
Solve compound mathematical problems involving the volume of cylinders, cubes, and cuboids (cm³ and m³)

sub_strands.sub_strand: Speed, Time, and Financial Accounting
outcomes: Determine speed, distance, and time relationships, converting between km/h and m/s
Prepare income and expenditure statements, evaluate simple interest, and construct household budgets up to 10,000 Shillings

sub_strands.sub_strand: Angles, Construction, and Linear Equations
outcomes: Construct angles of 90°, 60°, and 45° using a pair of compasses and a ruler, and find angles on a straight line and around a point
Formulate and solve single-variable linear equations from practical scenarios

sub_strands.sub_strand: Human Excretory and Nervous System Overview
outcomes: Identify, locate, and outline the physiological functions of the human excretory organs (skin, lungs, kidneys)
Describe structural configurations of the human nervous system and relate them to basic reflex arcs

sub_strands.sub_strand: Plants and Animals Reproduction
outcomes: Examine mechanisms of pollination and fertilization in flowering plants using physical flower dissections
Differentiate internal and external fertilization methods across various animal classes

sub_strands.sub_strand: Types of Forces and Energy Transformations
outcomes: Investigate properties of magnetic, gravitational, and frictional forces using physical laboratory set-ups
Demonstrate how mechanical energy converts to electrical energy or heat through interactive models

sub_strands.sub_strand: Spreadsheets, Multimedia Development, and Coding Logic
outcomes: Design basic data models, insert formulas (SUM, AVERAGE), and map charts using standard spreadsheet tools
Develop functional branching or looping logic programs using advanced block-based or text-based educational coding engines

sub_strands.sub_strand: Domestic Poultry Management and Crop Processing
outcomes: Outline structural requirements, feeding schedules, and disease control protocols for localized poultry framing systems
Demonstrate value addition sorting, clean processing, and standard packaging of tubers and cereal yields

sub_strands.sub_strand: Special Diets and Laundering Diverse Fabrics
outcomes: Plan and compile balanced nutritional matrices catering to individuals with special dietary needs (convalescents, manually working individuals)
Identify stain removal parameters and execute appropriate laundering cycles for cotton, wool, and synthetic fabrics

sub_strands.sub_strand: Mapping East Africa and Regional Climate Data
outcomes: Map positions, relief features, and transport networks across East Africa using coordinates and scale models
Evaluate the correlations between physical climate patterns and demographic settlement distributions

sub_strands.sub_strand: National Heroes, National Integration, and Democratic Systems
outcomes: Analyze roles of national historical figures in independence struggles and list elements that foster national cohesion
Outline the structure, arms, and functional responsibilities of the National Government of Kenya (Legislature, Executive, Judiciary)

sub_strands.sub_strand: Graphic Design, Puppet Theater, and Tie-and-Dye Techniques
outcomes: Create complex commercial designs, logos, and posters incorporating precise font sizes and color combinations
Produce pattern orientations on fabric substrates using advanced folding, binding, and tie-and-dye recipes

sub_strands.sub_strand: Ensemble Performances and Musical Notation
outcomes: Read, write, and execute simple musical staff notations comprising pitch ranges and duration signatures (semibreve, minim, crotchet)
Choreograph and stage full-scale theatrical plays or traditional multi-instrument string and percussion dances

sub_strands.sub_strand: Scriptural Studies, Substance Abuse Mitigation, and Integrity
outcomes: Critique peer behaviors and modern societal trends against foundational scriptural values on honesty, temperance, and work ethic
Formulate personalized action frameworks to resist substance abuse, peer pressure, and unethical shortcuts
